( i ) pw ’fff f!T #?r>sFr) P m , i 9 8 4 | i ( 2 ) ^ W crw t 5T^r?nT # srfc?r ff ^ i ^ ° 2. =^f5T3 ( W ^ ) f ’m , 1 9 8 3 t , — ( l ) 21 % ( 3) — (^ ) (m) %q-Tfp:# 3T?S ^ 3rr% ^r% ^ grW f ^ r ^rtrin- 1 270 GI/84 (^ ) (»r) ^ " i m m t't 3frt«Tt" m m % <mr^ 3fffc 5«itpT?r l ^ r 3 ? ^ :— ( jt) (’t) % q-^=5rrcT fJn:5Tf^rf^ f«TTfT^ f^!Tr ^r'lTirr, 3r«r%:—. “ (^) 3Tf^ srrt?^ fK?q- %prrrfar qr srf^- f^qfg-^rT WTf suffer r n j f w 3rr?rr | €t j p r % ^r*r;r 't t fK,?ir % f^irfgrr qr srf^f^TCErftr^rT srrT^ % f^f^=T 5rTfsRT?:ir z m m 5 t o srPdTfffrr f w 1” crr^fewfur: '■rf^ % ^i^qrw sr^Tfarw, »rr^-2, 3, (i) Jr gTo ^ro fno381-3T 9-5 -8 3 % ^ t Sr^ffW I f 1) -- 1 of 2 -- THE GAZETTE OF INDIA ; EXTRAORDINARY [ P a r t I I - S e c . 3(i)r % Tr<jrrw (i) Jr groifrrofJTo 8 3 - af 2 8 - 2 - 8 4 5 TTT I * ( 2 ) P m 3 0 % ( 1 ) ^ "sR r'w ^” ^ 'TfTT^ '% «rr^-2" TfTST fptr grrq^f I ( 3 ) 3 8 % 3T ? ^ ^ q m m T^rr 3rri^^; snrfw :— firjrnT^ ^ ^ >f^ 'FT’T1” [ t R T ^ ? t e T T 8 0 5 / 2 / 8 3 - t T ^ r ; { # ) ] f^jjT f^Tf ^r^fiT, MINISTRY OF INFORM ATION AND BROADCASTIN'G N OTIFICATION New Delhi, the 29th May, 1984 G.S.R. 413(E ):— In exercise of the powers con ferred by section 8 of the Cinematograph Act 1952 (37 of 1952), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to am6nd the Cinematograph (Certification) Rules, 1983, na mely :— 1. (1) These rules may be called the Cinema tograph (Certification) (Second Amendment) Rules, 1984. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Cinematograph (Certification) Rules, 1983,— (1) in sub-rule (3) of rule 21,— (a) the word “and” appearing at the end of the second proviso to clause (b ) shall be omitted ; (b) in clause (c) after the words “duplicate certificate", the following shall be insert ed, namely :— ‘*and’“ (c) after clause (c) the following clause shall be inserted,-namely :— “ (d ) if the application is made by a person other than the producer or copyright, holder of the film, an authorisation in writing on a stamped paper of appro priate value to be notified by the Chair m an from the producer or copyright holder of the film.” Foot note : published as GSR 381-E dated 9-5-83 in the Extraordinary Gazette of India Part II sectioa 3 sub-section (i) Amended by GSR 83-E dated 28-2-84 in the Extraordinary Gazette of India Part n section 3 sub-section (i). (2) in the proviso to sub-rule (1) of rule 30, after the words “a copy o f ’ the words “Part II of* shall be inserted. (3) at the end of rule 38 the following sentence shall be added, namely: — “Such advertisements shall indicate only the certified title of a film”. [File N o.805|2|83-F(C)] V. S. JAFA, Jt. Secy.
